message:
feat(fcp-core): add time-aware device posture validation for audit replay

Add is_expired_at(now_ms) to PostureAttestation and is_satisfied_by_at()
to PostureRequirements, enabling posture validation against a specific
historical timestamp rather than always using the current time.

This is critical for compliance audit replay: when reviewing past
operations, the system must evaluate whether posture requirements were
satisfied at the time the operation was performed, not at the time of
the audit. Update check_posture() in policy.rs to use the time-aware
methods.

Clarify documentation that attestation proves device posture "at a
point in time" rather than implying ongoing validity. Update test to
use OsType attribute instead of AntivirusActive for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
